### FROM BASE64
Decode a base64 string. Returns `null` and adds a warning header to the response if the
input is not valid base64 or the decoded bytes are not well-formed UTF-8.

```esql
ROW a = "ZWxhc3RpYw=="
| EVAL d = FROM_BASE64(a)
```
